message:
fix(atc): heap compaction, regret tracking, and commit-path error handling

- Add liveness schedule heap compaction to prevent unbounded growth from
  repeated reschedules of the same agent
- Rename evaluations to regret_samples and stop probe disagreements from
  diluting regret averages in shadow policy evaluation
- Pass slow controller probe limit through to budgeted_probe_schedule so
  the hard cap is respected alongside the policy max
- Make evaluate_liveness private (internal engine detail)
- Refactor register_agent to fetch existing row upfront instead of a
  separate existence check, avoiding the FrankenSQLite changes() issue
- Replace exists()-then-read pattern with direct error-code matching in
  both commit_paths and commit_paths_lockfree for correctness on TOCTOU
- Fix test expectations: use .into_result() for OutcomeError, update
  evaluate_liveness call sites for new LivenessEvaluation struct,
  correct ATC reinit test to seed with enabled config
- Add tests for schedule compaction, probe limit cap, regret dilution
  prevention, and lockfree/index deletion recording

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
